question: Which five papers report English as the natural language of their dataset?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:P181022 ?dtype . ?dtype orkgp:P181025 ?lang . ?lang rdfs:label ?langLabel . FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?langLabel)), 'english')) OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . } } ORDER BY ?paperLabel LIMIT 5

question: Which papers report a dataset format whose label mentions CSV or tabular data?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:P181022 ?dtype . ?dtype orkgp:P181023 ?format . ?format rdfs:label ?formatLabel . FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?formatLabel)), 'csv|tabular|spreadsheet')) OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . } } ORDER BY ?paperLabel

question: Which papers provide a release URL that points to GitHub for their implemented approach?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181046 ?approach . ?approach orkgp:release ?release . ?release orkgp:P1003 ?url . FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?url)), 'github')) OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . } } ORDER BY ?paperLabel

question: Which papers report evaluation metrics whose labels mention F1 or accuracy?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:HAS_EVALUATION ?eval . ?eval orkgp:P110006 ?metric . ?metric rdfs:label ?metricLabel . FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?metricLabel)), 'f1|accuracy')) OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . } } ORDER BY ?paperLabel

question: Which papers describe an implemented approach whose algorithm name mentions transformer or BERT?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181046 ?approach . ?approach orkgp:P58069 ?alg . ?alg rdfs:label ?algLabel . FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?algLabel)), 'transformer|bert|neural')) OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . } } ORDER BY ?paperLabel

question: Which papers compare their evaluation against a previous baseline?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:HAS_EVALUATION ?eval . ?eval orkgp:P181051 ?base . ?base orkgp:P181052 ?baseType . ?baseType rdfs:label ?baseLabel . FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?baseLabel)), 'previous|prior|baseline|state of the art')) OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . } } ORDER BY ?paperLabel

question: Which three papers report the largest number of annotators, and how many annotators do they report?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel ?numAnnotators WHERE { { SELECT ?paper (MAX(xsd:integer(?numAnnotatorsRaw)) AS ?numAnnotators) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181031 ?annoProc . ?annoProc orkgp:P181032 ?ann . ?ann orkgp:P59120 ?numAnnotatorsRaw . } GROUP BY ?paper ORDER BY DESC(?numAnnotators) LIMIT 3 } OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . } }

question: Which five papers report the largest number of data sources, and how many sources do they use?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel ?numSources WHERE { { SELECT ?paper (MAX(xsd:integer(?numSourcesRaw)) AS ?numSources) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:P181017 ?source . ?source orkgp:P181019 ?numSourcesRaw . } GROUP BY ?paper ORDER BY DESC(?numSources) LIMIT 5 } OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . } }

question: Which papers report at least five annotators?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181031 ?annoProc . ?annoProc orkgp:P181032 ?ann . ?ann orkgp:P59120 ?numAnnotators . FILTER(xsd:integer(?numAnnotators) >= 5) OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . } } ORDER BY ?paperLabel

FILTER(xsd:integer(?numSources) >= 2) OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . } } ORDER BY ?paperLabel

question: Which papers describe their annotators as domain experts or highly experienced in the application domain?

FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?expLabel)), 'expert|experienced|domain')) OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . } } ORDER BY ?paperLabel

question: Which papers say that annotation conflicts were resolved by discussion or adjudication?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181031 ?annoProc . ?annoProc orkgp:P181041 ?agreement . ?agreement orkgp:P181044 ?conflict . ?conflict rdfs:label ?conflictLabel . FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?conflictLabel)), 'discussion|adjudicat|consensus')) OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . } } ORDER BY ?paperLabel

question: Which papers do not report any baseline comparison in their evaluation?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?contribution orkgp:HAS_EVALUATION ?eval . ?eval orkgp:P181051 ?base . } OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . } } ORDER BY ?paperLabel

question: Which papers do not provide any release URL for their implemented approach?

FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?contribution orkgp:P181046 ?approach . ?approach orkgp:release ?release . ?release orkgp:P1003 ?url . } OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . } } ORDER BY ?paperLabel

FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?langLabel)), 'english|german')) } ORDER BY ?langLabel

FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?formatLabel)), 'csv|tabular|spreadsheet|xml|json')) } ORDER BY ?formatLabel

question: What license types are reported for datasets in NLP4RE papers?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?licenseLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:license ?lic . ?lic orkgp:P181027 ?license . ?license rdfs:label ?licenseLabel . FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?licenseLabel)), 'creative commons|cc|apache|mit|gpl')) } ORDER BY ?licenseLabel

question: What evaluation metrics are reported for NLP4RE papers that tackle classification tasks?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?metricLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181003 ?task . ?task orkgp:P181006 ?output . ?output orkgp:P181008 ?classLabel . ?contribution orkgp:HAS_EVALUATION ?eval . ?eval orkgp:P110006 ?metric . ?metric rdfs:label ?metricLabel . FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?metricLabel)), 'f1|accuracy|precision|recall')) } ORDER BY ?metricLabel

question: What NLP task types are reported for papers whose output is a classification label?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?taskTypeLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181003 ?task . ?task orkgp:P181004 ?taskType . ?taskType rdfs:label ?taskTypeLabel . ?task orkgp:P181006 ?output . ?output orkgp:P181008 ?classLabel . } ORDER BY ?taskTypeLabel

question: What is the average number of annotators reported across NLP4RE papers?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT (AVG(xsd:decimal(?numAnnotators)) AS ?avgAnnotators) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181031 ?annoProc . ?annoProc orkgp:P181032 ?ann . ?ann orkgp:P59120 ?numAnnotators . }

question: What is the minimum number of annotators reported in NLP4RE papers?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT (MIN(xsd:integer(?numAnnotators)) AS ?minAnnotators) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181031 ?annoProc . ?annoProc orkgp:P181032 ?ann . ?ann orkgp:P59120 ?numAnnotators . }

question: What is the average number of data sources reported across NLP4RE datasets?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT (AVG(xsd:decimal(?numSources)) AS ?avgSources) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:P181017 ?source . ?source orkgp:P181019 ?numSources . }

question: What is the maximum number of data sources reported in NLP4RE papers?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT (MAX(xsd:integer(?numSources)) AS ?maxSources) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:P181017 ?source . ?source orkgp:P181019 ?numSources . }

question: What is the average number of data items in datasets whose natural language is English?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT (AVG(xsd:decimal(?items)) AS ?avgItems) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:P181015 ?items . ?dataset orkgp:P181022 ?dtype . ?dtype orkgp:P181025 ?lang . ?lang rdfs:label ?langLabel . FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?langLabel)), 'english')) }

question: How many papers report at least five annotators?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?paperCount) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181031 ?annoProc . ?annoProc orkgp:P181032 ?ann . ?ann orkgp:P59120 ?numAnnotators . FILTER(xsd:integer(?numAnnotators) >= 5) }

question: How many papers report at least two data sources?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?paperCount) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:P181017 ?source . ?source orkgp:P181019 ?numSources . FILTER(xsd:integer(?numSources) >= 2) }

question: How many papers report metrics whose labels mention F1 or accuracy?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?paperCount) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:HAS_EVALUATION ?eval . ?eval orkgp:P110006 ?metric . ?metric rdfs:label ?metricLabel . FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?metricLabel)), 'f1|accuracy')) }

question: What is the average number of annotators in papers that resolve annotation conflicts by discussion?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT (AVG(xsd:decimal(?numAnnotators)) AS ?avgAnnotators) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181031 ?annoProc . ?annoProc orkgp:P181032 ?ann . ?ann orkgp:P59120 ?numAnnotators . ?annoProc orkgp:P181041 ?agreement . ?agreement orkgp:P181044 ?conflict . ?conflict rdfs:label ?conflictLabel . FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?conflictLabel)), 'discussion|adjudicat|consensus')) }

question: What is the minimum number of data items reported for English-language datasets?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT (MIN(xsd:integer(?items)) AS ?minItems) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:P181015 ?items . ?dataset orkgp:P181022 ?dtype . ?dtype orkgp:P181025 ?lang . ?lang rdfs:label ?langLabel . FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?langLabel)), 'english')) }

question: What is the maximum number of annotators reported in papers that use transformer-based algorithms?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT (MAX(xsd:integer(?numAnnotators)) AS ?maxAnnotators) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181046 ?approach . ?approach orkgp:P58069 ?alg . ?alg rdfs:label ?algLabel . FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?algLabel)), 'transformer|bert|neural')) ?contribution orkgp:P181031 ?annoProc . ?annoProc orkgp:P181032 ?ann . ?ann orkgp:P59120 ?numAnnotators . }

question: What is the average publication year of papers that release their tools on GitHub?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT (AVG(xsd:decimal(?year)) AS ?avgYear) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181046 ?approach . ?approach orkgp:release ?release . ?release orkgp:P1003 ?url . FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?url)), 'github')) ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year . }

question: In which year was the earliest paper published among those that report English-language datasets?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT (MIN(xsd:integer(?year)) AS ?year) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:P181022 ?dtype . ?dtype orkgp:P181025 ?lang . ?lang rdfs:label ?langLabel . FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?langLabel)), 'english')) }

question: In which year was the latest paper published among those that use a CSV or tabular data format?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT (MAX(xsd:integer(?year)) AS ?year) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:P181022 ?dtype . ?dtype orkgp:P181023 ?format . ?format rdfs:label ?formatLabel . FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?formatLabel)), 'csv|tabular|spreadsheet')) }

question: In which year was the paper with the largest number of annotators published?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE { { SELECT ?paper ?year ?numAnnotators WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year . ?contribution orkgp:P181031 ?annoProc . ?annoProc orkgp:P181032 ?ann . ?ann orkgp:P59120 ?numAnnotators . } ORDER BY DESC(xsd:integer(?numAnnotators)) LIMIT 1 } }

question: In which year was the paper with the largest number of data sources published?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE { { SELECT ?paper ?year ?numSources WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:P181017 ?source . ?source orkgp:P181019 ?numSources . } ORDER BY DESC(xsd:integer(?numSources)) LIMIT 1 } }

question: In which year were the earliest papers published that provide a GitHub release URL for their implemented approach?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT (MIN(xsd:integer(?year)) AS ?year) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year . ?contribution orkgp:P181046 ?approach . ?approach orkgp:release ?release . ?release orkgp:P1003 ?url . FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?url)), 'github')) }

question: In which year were the latest papers published that compare against a baseline?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT (MAX(xsd:integer(?year)) AS ?year) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year . ?contribution orkgp:HAS_EVALUATION ?eval . ?eval orkgp:P181051 ?base . }

question: In which year was the paper with the fewest annotators published?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE { { SELECT ?paper ?year ?numAnnotators WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year . ?contribution orkgp:P181031 ?annoProc . ?annoProc orkgp:P181032 ?ann . ?ann orkgp:P59120 ?numAnnotators . } ORDER BY xsd:integer(?numAnnotators) LIMIT 1 } }

question: In which year was the earliest paper published that reports an F1 or accuracy metric?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT (MIN(xsd:integer(?year)) AS ?year) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year . ?contribution orkgp:HAS_EVALUATION ?eval . ?eval orkgp:P110006 ?metric . ?metric rdfs:label ?metricLabel . FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?metricLabel)), 'f1|accuracy')) }

question: In which year was the latest paper published that describes its annotators as domain experts?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT (MAX(xsd:integer(?year)) AS ?year) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year . ?contribution orkgp:P181031 ?annoProc . ?annoProc orkgp:P181032 ?ann . ?ann orkgp:P181034 ?exp . ?exp rdfs:label ?expLabel . FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?expLabel)), 'expert|experienced|domain')) }

question: In which year was the paper with the largest number of data items published?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE { { SELECT ?paper ?year ?items WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:P181015 ?items . } ORDER BY DESC(xsd:integer(?items)) LIMIT 1 } }
